title: Podman pod create/rm/ps commands with man pages and tests
body:
This is the first in a series of partial PR requests based on #1057 . This first PR adds podman pod create/rm and adds bash completions. A stripped down version of pod ps is included to also include the tests

Signed-off-by: haircommander <pehunt@redhat.com>

comments.body: I'm going to give this a full review after lunch. I'd really like to get this in soon so we can focus on `ps` and have a usable `podman pod` command for next release.
per @rhatdan's suggestion, I've included ps, create and rm as the first functional group of commands. Next up will be stop and start.
@mheon github is confused but I took care of everything except for the filtering. If you really want that changed I can do it tomorrow. I have an intern event for the rest of the day

@haircommander Tomorrow's fine!
@rhatdan @baude @TomSweeneyRedHat @umohnani8 PTAL if you have time

:pushpin: Commit a04a8d1 has been approved by `mheon`
